summary: Iteration 192 testing complete: Group Forge & Coven System. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Coven panel UI with create/join forms, ForgePanel with Group Forge button logic (appears only during active forge when in coven).
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/sync/covens creates coven with 8-char invite code - PASS
POST /api/sync/covens/join returns 404 for invalid invite code - PASS
POST /api/sync/covens/leave returns 400 if not in coven - PASS
GET /api/sync/covens/my returns in_coven=false when not in coven - PASS
GET /api/sync/covens/my returns coven details with members when in coven - PASS
POST /api/sync/group-forge returns 400 when not in coven - PASS
POST /api/sync/group-forge returns 400 when less than 2 online members - PASS
POST /api/sync/group-forge returns 400/404 for invalid build_id (check order dependent) - PASS
GET /api/sync/online-count returns online WebSocket count - PASS
Frontend: coven-panel shows create/join forms when not in coven - PASS
Frontend: ForgePanel shows group-forge-btn ONLY during active forge when covenData is present - PASS (code verified)
Frontend: ForgePanel shows Solo Forge button during active forge - PASS (code verified)
seed_data_creation: Test covens created and cleaned up during tests (TEST_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 192 Group Forge & Coven System fully working. The group-forge-btn in ForgePanel appears ONLY when: (1) user is in a coven (covenData is truthy), AND (2) an active forge is in progress (forging=true). To test the Group Forge button visibility: create a coven, acquire items from Circular Economy to unlock forge recipes, start a forge, then the Group Forge button will appear next to Solo Forge. The group forge endpoint requires 2+ online WebSocket users in the same coven to succeed.

backend_apis.POST /api/sync/covens: Creates coven with name, returns coven_id, invite_code (8 chars), success message
backend_apis.POST /api/sync/covens/join: Joins coven via invite_code, returns 404 for invalid code, 400 if already in coven
backend_apis.POST /api/sync/covens/leave: Leaves current coven, returns 400 if not in coven
backend_apis.GET /api/sync/covens/my: Returns in_coven, coven details with members list, role, invite_code
backend_apis.POST /api/sync/group-forge: Returns 400 if not in coven, 400 if <2 online members, 404 for invalid build_id

group_forge_btn.visibility_condition: Only visible when forging=true AND covenData is truthy
group_forge_btn.verified: Code verified - button appears during active forge when user is in coven
